description: Poll a Qlik Replicate task's state via the Enterprise Manager REST API; trigger a Dagster job on any transition into a target state (default STOPPED). Event-driven pattern for chaining downstream Dagster work off Replicate task completion or failure.

server.label: Replicate Server
server.description: Server name as registered in Enterprise Manager.

target_states.label: Target States
target_states.description: Task states that should trigger the downstream job. Common values: STOPPED, RUNNING, ERROR, STARTING. Match is case-insensitive.

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Job to trigger on state match.
